why_included_as_exemplar: Selected as a curated biological exemplar for role-spectrum interpretation, not because exemplar status changes evidence strength.

what_this_gene_cannot_establish: causality, validation, papilla-specific TWAS support, SMR/coloc support, therapeutic target status
recommended_figure3_role: curated exemplar role strip; do not use as evidence-upgrading tier
notes: Exemplar flag retained separately from genetic and TWAS axes.
